name: Portuense Portuguese
notes: Porto city and Greater Porto (Gaia, Miragaia, Leça, Vitória). Heavy vowel reduction but syllable structure more preserved than Minho interior. Uvular variation: [ʁ, χ, ʀ, x]. Retroflex sibilants moderate in suburban/rural fringes (Alvarenga, Gaia). Heavily velarised coda [ɫ].
